upasargachandrika.example_text: 'pumA~ enaM tanute utkfRatti pumAn vitatne aDi nAke asmin' (f0 101302) utkfRatti udvezwayati

'yaTA SrAnto'vimucyamAna utkftyetEvaM yajamAnA utkftyeran' (E0 brA0 633) avimucyamAno'vizIyamARo'viyujyamAnaH SakawAt yugyo'SvAdiriti SezaH utkftyeta svayamevotkrAntavezwanaH syAt nirmuktabanDano Bavet utkftyeta ucCidyeteti tu sAyaRaH
'AstAM jAlma udaraM SraMsayitvA koSa ivAbanDaH parikftyamAnaH' (aTarva0 4167) parikftyamAno vezwyamAnaH
